title: From Friendship to Sexual Exploitation: How Amravati Sex Scandal Key Accused Ayaz Lured Over 180 Minors Into A Blackmail Racket; 6 Arrested, SIT Formed
description: The Amravati sex scandal has exposed a disturbing racket where accused Mohammed Ayaz Tanveer allegedly trapped over 180 minors through a love‑trap scheme. Six arrests have been made, a SIT formed, and political heat is mounting as authorities intensify the probe.
